message:
feat: Integrate frozen interpreter into edgeboxc build pipeline

- Wire edgebox-freeze into edgeboxc build:
  - Extract function names from bundle.js via simple parser
  - Run edgebox-freeze after qjsc to generate frozen_functions.c
  - Add frozen_functions.c to wasm-static build
  - Call frozen_init() after bytecode load to hot-swap functions

- Make frozen interpreter general-purpose (not fib-specific):
  - Use stack-based codegen for all self-recursive functions
  - Direct C recursion (no JS_Call overhead) via _impl pattern
  - Add FROZEN_DUP/FROZEN_FREE macros for SMI optimization
  - Skip refcount for immediate values (int, bool)

- Add function name support:
  - --names option to specify JS function names for registration
  - Parse atom strings from bytecode (partial)
  - Register frozen functions with original names on globalThis

Performance (fib(35)):
- Interpreted: ~920ms
- Frozen: ~167ms (5.5x speedup)
- Works correctly for factorial and other recursive patterns

Note: The 22x speedup requires eliminating the stack via SSA analysis,
which would require pattern-specific code generation.
